minimum_coverage: At least one L1/L2 source for company facts; one L5 source for price or valuation; expectation baseline or explicit source_gap
source_gap_action: If issuer primary disclosure is missing stop durable thesis; if consensus is missing mark source_gap and reduce expectation-confidence
refresh_rule: Refresh after next earnings, material 8-K, guidance change, or 90 days

minimum_coverage: Earnings release or filing; transcript or explicit transcript_gap; price reaction; consensus proxy or source_gap
source_gap_action: If transcript is missing mark transcript_gap; if consensus is missing mark source_gap and avoid beat/miss overclaim
refresh_rule: Refresh when transcript, 10-Q/10-K, consensus update, or peer result arrives

minimum_coverage: Update trigger plus prior thesis package; at least one confirming/disconfirming source where practical
source_gap_action: If trigger cannot be verified write needs_refresh or watch_only
refresh_rule: Refresh when trigger source is confirmed, contradicted, or superseded

minimum_coverage: Specific event source; market reaction; expectation baseline or explicit source_gap
source_gap_action: If event has only social sourcing keep as narrative_watch or rumor_watch
refresh_rule: Refresh within 14 days or when primary confirmation arrives

minimum_coverage: Concept definition; value-chain evidence; at least one primary or official source for major factual claims
source_gap_action: If only narratives exist downgrade to concept_watch and list evidence gaps
refresh_rule: Refresh on policy change, capacity update, major earnings cycle, or 90 days

minimum_coverage: Official data series with as-of date; market pricing series if asset impact is discussed
source_gap_action: If official series unavailable do not infer macro fact from commentary
refresh_rule: Refresh at next official release or policy event

minimum_coverage: Exchange or issuer/listing signal; product identity; launch or filing status
source_gap_action: If only media/discovery table exists keep candidate unconfirmed
refresh_rule: Refresh when exchange/issuer/fund filing confirms, amends, or withdraws
notes: Discovery output should not overstate listing certainty

minimum_coverage: Ticker/listing status; issuer product page or filing; holdings/AUM/volume if listed
source_gap_action: If holdings or fee source is missing mark source_gap and avoid exposure precision
refresh_rule: Refresh after first holdings file, first full trading week, or material product update

minimum_coverage: Original method source; implementation details; at least one independent review or replication attempt where practical
source_gap_action: If no primary method source exists keep method as unreviewed
refresh_rule: Refresh when new replication, critique, dataset, or implementation change appears

minimum_coverage: At least one traceable event source; price/volume context; explicit status for social or rumor inputs
source_gap_action: If only anonymous rumor exists write unverified_rumor and watch_only
refresh_rule: Refresh within 24-72 hours for active rumor watch or at next company/regulatory update
notes: Looser input standard, same conclusion standard

minimum_coverage: Current thesis state; price/valuation change; stale/refresh state for each holding or watch item
source_gap_action: If case is stale mark needs_refresh before making portfolio-level judgment
refresh_rule: Refresh on PM review cadence, major event, or stale_after breach
